vuln_q_0096_0001.title: Clear-text logging of sensitive information
vuln_q_0096_0001.description: This expression logs [sensitive data (password)](1) as clear text.

vuln_q_0096_0001.title: Use of a broken or weak cryptographic hashing algorithm on sensitive data
vuln_q_0096_0001.description:
[Sensitive data (password)](1) is used in a hashing algorithm (SHA256) that is insecure for password hashing, since it is not a computationally expensive hash function.
[Sensitive data (password)](2) is used in a hashing algorithm (SHA256) that is insecure for password hashing, since it is not a computationally expensive hash function.

vuln_q_0025_0000.title: Use of insecure SSL/TLS version
vuln_q_0025_0000.description:
Insecure SSL/TLS protocol version TLSv1 allowed by [call to ssl.create_default_context](1).
Insecure SSL/TLS protocol version TLSv1_1 allowed by [call to ssl.create_default_context](1).

vuln_q_0014_0001.title: Flask app is run in debug mode
vuln_q_0014_0001.description: A Flask app appears to be run in debug mode. This may allow an attacker to run arbitrary code through the debugger.

vuln_q_0071_0004.title: Flask app is run in debug mode
vuln_q_0071_0004.description: A Flask app appears to be run in debug mode. This may allow an attacker to run arbitrary code through the debugger.

vuln_q_0009_0001.title: XML internal entity expansion
vuln_q_0009_0001.description: XML parsing depends on a [user-provided value](1) without guarding against uncontrolled entity expansion.

vuln_q_0006_0003.title: Overly permissive file permissions
vuln_q_0006_0003.description: Overly permissive mask in chmod sets file to world writable.

vuln_q_0007_0000.title: Overly permissive file permissions
vuln_q_0007_0000.description: Overly permissive mask in chmod sets file to world readable.
